provenance: docs/art/TILE-ART-SPEC.md governs this file's schema (section 7); section 8 is the pack-swap procedure this file enacts. DECISIONS.md art register (Eli 2026-07-12): 'Luminous-on-black (Moonring style): deep black base, glowing color'. Pack: Kenney 1-Bit Pack v1.2 (CC0), content/art/kenney/License.txt.
notes: Real-art mapping for the Kenney 1-bit pack. Unlike the placeholder mapping (content/art/placeholder/art-mapping.json, still a valid procedural fallback), 'atlas' points at a real PNG sheet and adds 'sheet' + 'regions' (name -> [col,row] tile) read by SheetAtlasSpec. The sheet is white-on-transparent monochrome: ONE grayscale sprite per visual category (wall/floor/...) is shared across materials, each glowing its own 'tint' (client-only presentation data; sim-core material raws stay appearance-agnostic). Tinting is a batch color multiply in WorldRenderer, restored to white after each tile. chromatis' heatGlowTint / colorStops emissive mechanism is untouched.
regionsProvenance: Cells picked from the packed sheet (content/art/kenney/Tilesheet/monochrome-transparent_packed.png, 49x22 tiles @16px). wall=(10,17) offset brick courses; floor=(1,17) fine checker; floor_wood=(4,6) horizontal planks; floor_earth=(2,0) gravel speckle; water reuses the (4,6) ripple sprite tinted cyan; missing reuses the checker as a fallback. Walls share ONE brick sprite tint-differentiated per material (task-sanctioned reuse); floors get three textures for variety.

trudgeon_wood@getilia_soak.notes: Treatment-derived id minted at load (getilia_soak); the '@' is verbatim in the material key but not a filesystem path (regions are grid coords, not files).

chromatis.provenance: tint is the canon bucket-0 silver-blue (ARCHITECTURE section 10 / WorldBible section 9). heatGlowTint is the discharge/saturation overlay read by JsonTileArtResolver.heatGlowTintRgb; the colorStops/appearance-bucket emissive mechanism is a separate feature this tile tint does not touch.

lightstone.notes: Chargeable emissive. If colorStops ship, add per-bucket regions later; bucket clamp keeps the single region correct until then.

glowstone.provenance: WorldBible section 9: eerie red light. minLight is the cosmetic observer clamp (TILE-ART-SPEC section 5.1).

reman_concrete.provenance: Reman engineering = concrete-equivalent, the wealth-high compound material (canon-trojian-compounds). Cool blue-white glow reads as engineered/high-status, brighter than the slum leather/cloth below.

leather.provenance: Rooftop-slum construction (canon-trojian-compounds): cheap hide. Dim warm tan, deliberately poorer/dimmer than reman_concrete.

cloth.provenance: Rooftop-slum construction: cheap fabric/tent. Dim tan, poorer/dimmer than reman_concrete.
